title: olfersia langsdorffii
intro: Olfersia langsdorffii, also known as Langsdorffia or Chinese dodder, is a parasitic plant that belongs to the family Balsamorhizaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Olfersia langsdorffii include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve circulation. Olfersia langsdorffii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
